hero.title: Vincent Chevais
hero.subtitle: I build things with React & Sass.
hero.description1: I’m a front-end developer focused on building responsive, accessible and modern web interfaces.
hero.description2: I enjoy turning ideas and designs into clean, user-friendly experiences.

about.title: 01. About Me
about.paragraph1: After starting from scratch, I trained in web development and built a solid foundation in front-end development.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy creating responsive interfaces, improving user experience, and writing clean, maintainable code.
about.paragraph3: My goal is to continue growing as a developer through real projects and team collaboration.
about.paragraph4: I’m particularly interested in React, component architecture and thoughtful UI design.
